# Contributing

Thanks for considering a contribution.

## Before You Start
- Search existing issues and pull requests to avoid duplicates.
- For large changes, open an issue first to discuss scope and approach.

## Development
- Use `npm install` in the repository root.
- Run the app via a static file server and open MaptyApp/index.html.

## Submitting Changes
- Keep pull requests focused and small when possible.
- Describe the problem, solution, and any trade-offs.
- Include screenshots or recordings for UI changes.

## Code Style
- Prefer clear, descriptive names.
- Avoid unrelated formatting changes.
